overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person walk through a sunny Los Santos neighborhood. The player walks along sidewalks past graffiti-covered buildings, crosses streets, and navigates through an intersection with moderate traffic, passing palm trees, apartment buildings, and various pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with graffiti-covered commercial buildings

events.description: two pedestrians walk toward camera and pass by closely on the left
approaching the blue parking booth at the end of the block

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to buildings with large graffiti murals

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera then passing by on the left side

tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
multi-story residential apartment buildings across the street
ornate metal street lamp post on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a walk along an urban sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered building. Two pedestrians approach and pass by the camera. Palm trees and apartment buildings line the street under bright midday sun as the camera approaches a blue parking booth at the end of the block.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot entrance with attendant booth and crosswalk

events.description: turning left around the blue parking booth structure

agents.ego_description: navigating around the parking booth and crossing the street toward the grassy median area

entered.detail: small blue and white parking attendant booth with 24hr signage
multi-story white apartment complex with balconies

strip of green grass between road and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left around a blue parking booth and enters a small plaza area. After passing the booth, the camera crosses a brick-paved crosswalk. A white apartment building becomes visible on the left while the grassy median appears on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with grassy median and apartment buildings

events.description: turning right to follow the sidewalk along the grassy median
white sedan and other vehicles passing on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a grassy median, passing residential apartment buildings

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tan colored multi-story apartment building with garage doors on ground floor
large leafy trees providing shade on the right side of the sidewalk
tall downtown buildings visible on the horizon
white building with green roof and garage doors appearing in the distance
tall cylindrical apartment building on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Walking along a residential sidewalk with a grassy median strip on the left. The camera passes a beige apartment building and continues toward an intersection. Trees line the right side of the path while distant city skyscrapers are visible ahead. An auto repair garage and tall circular apartment building come into view as the camera approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with auto repair shop and steep uphill road

events.description: approaching intersection with pedestrians waiting at the street corner
crossing the street as a taxi and dump truck pass through the intersection
beginning ascent up the steep hill past the circular apartment building

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection, waiting for vehicles to clear, then walking up the steep hill

notable_agents.action: blue and yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection
large green dump truck turning at the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal poles and lights at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy intersection with an auto repair garage on the right. After waiting for a taxi and dump truck to pass, the camera crosses the street and begins ascending a steep hill. The tall circular apartment building dominates the right side of the frame as the camera climbs the incline, with traffic lights and downtown buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sunny urban neighborhood that transitions from a graffiti-lined street into a steep residential climb. It begins along a sidewalk beside a graffiti-covered building, passing pedestrians and palm trees under a bright midday sun before approaching a blue parking booth. As the camera turns left around the booth, the scene shifts into a small plaza and across a brick-paved crosswalk, where a white apartment building and a grassy median emerge. The path then opens into a residential stretch passing a beige apartment complex and an auto repair garage, with distant city skyscrapers appearing on the horizon. Finally, after waiting for a taxi and dump truck to clear a busy intersection, the camera crosses the street and ascends a steep hill dominated by a tall circular apartment building.
